case_title: 57 TAYLOR 17, LP VS. KEENAN WELLS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR 17, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS, KEENAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR STREET, APT. 350, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, KEENAN
DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR 17, LP
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ENDORSED FILED COPY RETURNED IN SASE.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $56.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR 17, LP

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS / EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER ALLOWING THE POSTING OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER; MEMORANDU OF POINTS & AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR 17, LP
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR 17, LP AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, KEENAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR 17, LP SERVED MAY-24-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, KEENAN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR 17, LP SERVED MAY-24-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
